response: the sacred verses of siriragau mahala 3 speak of the spirit of devotion and the gene of divine connection that flows through the heart of a true seeker - the path of bhakti is only possible through the grace of the guru - without the guidance of the guru the spirit cannot reach its purest form - the language of the soul is the sacred word that unites all beings - the visit to the guru is not just a physical journey but a spiritual awakening - the soul finds peace when it merges with the divine - the gene of love and devotion is passed on through generations - the language of the heart is understood only by those who have experienced the grace of the guru - the spirit is cleansed through the remembrance of the divine - the visit to the sacred texts is a way to connect with the eternal truth - the gene of faith is nurtured through the teachings of the guru - the language of the spirit is beyond words - the visit to the guru is the key to unlocking the divine within - the spirit finds its home in the presence of the divine - the gene of devotion is the foundation of true spirituality - the language of the soul is the sacred word that guides the way - the visit to the guru is the beginning of a lifelong journey of spiritual growth - the spirit is transformed through the grace of the divine - the gene of love is the essence of true bhakti - the language of the heart is the voice of the divine - the visit to the sacred path is the ultimate goal of the seeker - the spirit is united with the divine through the grace of the guru - the gene of faith is the foundation of all spiritual progress - the language of the soul is the sacred word that brings peace - the visit to the divine is the fulfillment of the soul's journey - the spirit is awakened through the teachings of the guru - the gene of devotion is the key to spiritual enlightenment - the language of the heart is the voice of the divine - the visit to the sacred path is the beginning of a new life - the spirit is transformed through the grace of the divine - the gene of love is the essence of true spirituality - the language of the soul is the sacred word that guides the way - the visit to the guru is the key to unlocking the divine within - the spirit finds its home in the presence of the divine -
